/* MOBILE NAV + POPUPS (≤1024px) */
@media only screen and (max-width: 1024px) {

  /* Apply to wrappers + all children */
  .mobile-scroll-nav,

  .popup-overlay,
  .popup-overlay *,

  .popup-list *,

  /* Use real weights your kit provides to avoid faux bold */
  .scrollable-links a,
  .scrollable-links .popup-trigger,
  .popup-link,
  .popup-link a,
  .popup-close { font-weight: 600; }  /* bump to 700 only if that cut exists */
  .nested-subnav a { font-weight: 400; }
}
.mobile-scroll-nav,
.popup-overlay {
  font-family: var(--mng-font-base) !important;
}

/* IMPORTANT: avoid faux-bold fallbacks by using a weight that actually exists */
.scrollable-links a,
.scrollable-links .popup-trigger,
.popup-link,
.popup-link a,
.popup-close {
  font-weight: 700; /* change to 600/500 if your loaded Swiss cut doesn't include 700 */
}

  /* Scrollable top nav */
  .mobile-scroll-nav {
    overflow-x: auto;
    overflow-y: hidden;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    padding: 4px 4px 0 0;
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  }
  .mobile-scroll-nav::-webkit-scrollbar,
  .scrollable-links::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none !important; }

  .scrollable-links {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 0 2px;
    margin: 0 !important;
    list-style: none;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .scrollable-links li {
    display: inline-block;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  /* Nudge first link slightly */
  .scrollable-links li:first-child { margin-left: 2px; }

  /* Base link look (top rail + triggers) */
  .scrollable-links a,
  .scrollable-links .popup-trigger {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #10069f !important;
    text-decoration: none;
    padding: 6px 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: inline-block;
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  /* Popup overlay */
  .popup-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98);
    z-index: 999;
    padding: 16px 0;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
  .popup-overlay.active { display: flex; }

  .popup-content {
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 320px;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 16px;
    position: relative;
  }

  .popup-close {
    position: absolute;
    top: 10px; right: 10px;
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #10069f;
    font-weight: bold;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 8px;
    line-height: 1;
    z-index: 1001;
  }

  .popup-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 14px;
    margin-top: 24px;
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .popup-link {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #10069f;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .popup-link.no-chevron { justify-content: flex-start; }

  .popup-link a {
    color: #10069f;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .popup-overlay .popup-link .chevron {
    font-size: 18px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    color: #10069f !important;
    margin-left: 4px !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    transition: font-weight 0.2s ease;
  }

  .nested-subnav {
    display: none;

  }

  }

  .popup-list > *:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

  /* Remove top/btm spacing from the PB HTML wrapper */
  [data-content-type="html"][data-element="main"] {
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
    padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  }

  /* ── HARD KILL any underline/active highlight on mobile ─────────── */
  /* Top scrollable nav (all states, very specific) */
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a,
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a:link,
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a:visited,
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a:hover,
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a:focus,
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a:focus-visible,

    text-decoration: none !important;
    -webkit-text-decoration: none !important;
    text-decoration-line: none !important;
    border-bottom: 0 !important;          /* kill border-based underline */
    background-image: none !important;     /* kill gradient underline tricks */
    outline: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    color: #10069f !important;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; /* remove tap flash */
  }
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links li a::after,

    content: none !important;
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Popup links (all states) */
  .popup-list a,
  .popup-list a:link,
  .popup-list a:visited,
  .popup-list a:hover,
  .popup-list a:focus,
  .popup-list a:focus-visible,
  .popup-list a:active,
  .popup-list a:-webkit-any-link {
    text-decoration: none !important;
    -webkit-text-decoration: none !important;
    text-decoration-line: none !important;
    border-bottom: 0 !important;
    background-image: none !important;
    outline: none !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    color: #10069f !important;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .popup-list a::after,
  .popup-list a::before {
    content: none !important;
    display: none !important;
  }
}
/* END ≤1024px */
</style>

<style>
/* === Overrides: tighter mobile top nav === */
@media only screen and (max-width: 1024px) {
  /* Pull the rail closer to the left and remove extra top padding */
  .mobile-scroll-nav {
    padding: 2px 0 0 0 !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
  }

  /* Make items sit closer together */
  .scrollable-links {
    gap: 4px !important;           /* was 6px */
    padding: 0 0 0 0 !important;   /* remove side padding */
    margin: 0 !important;
  }

  /* Remove the manual left nudge so the first link hugs the edge */
  .scrollable-links li:first-child {
    margin-left: 0 !important;     /* was 2px */
  }

  /* Trim horizontal padding on each chip + keep font size compact */
  .scrollable-links a,
  .scrollable-links .popup-trigger {
    padding: 6px 4px !important;   /* was 6px 6px */
    font-size: 13px !important;    /* keep readable */
    line-height: 1.2 !important;
  }

  /* Ensure the last item isn’t clipped; also makes it “peek” on small screens */
  .scrollable-links::after {
    content: "" !important;
    flex: 0 0 12px !important;     /* small tail space at right edge */
  }

  /* Optional: on very narrow phones, go even tighter */
  @media only screen and (max-width: 360px) {
    .scrollable-links {
      gap: 3px !important;
    }
    .scrollable-links a,
    .scrollable-links .popup-trigger {
      padding: 6px 3px !important;
      font-size: 12px !important;
    }
  }
}
</style>

<style>
@media only screen and (max-width: 1024px) {
  /* 1) Remove spacing on the HTML content-type wrapper itself */
  .pagebuilder-content-type[data-content-type="html"],
  [data-content-type="html"][data-element="main"] {
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;

    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;

    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
  }
  .mobile-scroll-nav .scrollable-links {
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }

  /* 3) Prevent the NEXT element from pushing down with its own top margin/padding */
  .mobile-scroll-nav + * {
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }
  /* common PB siblings—belt & suspenders */
  .mobile-scroll-nav + .pagebuilder-banner-wrapper,
  .mobile-scroll-nav + .pagebuilder-row,
  .mobile-scroll-nav + .pagebuilder-column-line,
  .mobile-scroll-nav + .layout_wrapper,
  .mobile-scroll-nav + .pagebuilder-slider {
    margin-top: 0 !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1025px) {

  .pagebuilder-row.featured-image-promo-row--desktop.desktop-only {
    position: relative !important;
    left: 50% !important;
    right: 50% !important;
    margin-left: -50vw !important;
    margin-right: -50vw !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    max-width: 100vw !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  /* Inner wrapper = 1600px like double-image-row */
  .promo-wrapper--desktop {
    max-width: 1600px !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    margin: 0 auto !important;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .promo-columns--desktop {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
    gap: 20px !important;
    margin: 0 !important; /* removes previous centering attempts */
  }

  .promo-columns--desktop .promo-tile {
    flex: 0 0 calc(50% - 10px);
    max-width: calc(50% - 10px);
    padding: 0 10px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
}

/* Shared styles */
.promo-tile {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.image-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
}
.image-wrapper img {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border: none;
  z-index: 1;
}
.overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  background: rgba(16, 6, 159, 0);
  transition: background 0.3s;
}
.promo-tile:hover .overlay {
  background: rgba(16, 6, 159, 0.5);
}
.pagebuilder-banner-button {
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: visible;
}
.promo-tile:hover .pagebuilder-banner-button {
  opacity: 1;
}

.promo-heading {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #10069f;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

<style>
/* ────────────────────────────────
   1. GLOBAL RESET & HELPERS
   ──────────────────────────────── */
.page-wrapper,
.columns,
.column.main,
.page-main,
.content-wrapper {
  position: relative !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* row-level full-bleed utility (apply via PageBuilder row class) */
.pagebuilder-row.full-bleed {
  position: relative !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  right: 50% !important;
  margin-left: -50vw !important;
  margin-right: -50vw !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* easy hide / show */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .desktop-only { display: none !important; }
}
@media (min-width: 1025px) {
  .mobile-only { display: none !important; }
}

/* prevent mobile horizontal scroll & add safe gutter */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; }

  .pagebuilder-row {
    padding-left: 15px !important;
    padding-right: 15px !important;
  }

  .pagebuilder-row img,
  .pagebuilder-row video,
  .pagebuilder-banner-button {
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   2. BUTTONS – baseline + hover-only special case
   ──────────────────────────────── */
:root {
  --btn-bg: #10069f;
  --btn-color: #fff;
}

.pagebuilder-banner-button {
  font: 700 14px/1.3 var(--font-family__base);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 12px 24px !important;
  background: var(--btn-bg) !important;
  color: var(--btn-color) !important;
  border: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  transition: none !important;
  margin-top: 10px !important;
  min-width: unset !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  text-align: center;
}

/* inline-style safety */
.pagebuilder-banner-button[style] {
  background: unset !important;
  color: unset !important;
}

/* hover / focus */
.pagebuilder-banner-button:hover,
.pagebuilder-banner-button:focus {
  background: var(--btn-bg) !important;
  color: var(--btn-color) !important;
}

/* mobile width tweaks */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .pagebuilder-banner-button {
    max-width: 280px !important;
    width: auto !important;
  }
  .mobile-half-btn {
    width: 50% !important;
    max-width: 160px !important;
    margin: 0 auto !important;
  }
}

/* FEATURED-IMAGE-PROMO buttons start hidden – override default */
.featured-image-promo-row .pagebuilder-banner-button {
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: visible;
}
.promo-tile:hover .pagebuilder-banner-button {
  opacity: 1;
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   3. SLIDER (Blocks 1 & 2 HTML / JS stay as-is)
   ──────────────────────────────── */
.slider-container {
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .3s ease-in-out;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  max-width: 1600px !important;
}
.slider-container.slick-initialized .slide { opacity: 1; }

.slider-container .slide {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 1px;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity .4s ease-in-out;
}

.slider-container img {
  display: block;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
}

/* manual dots */
.slider-dots-manual {
  display: flex !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  gap: 16px;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.slider-dots-manual .manual-dot {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: none !important;
  background: #e0e0e0;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  transition: background-color .3s;
}
.slider-dots-manual .manual-dot:hover { background: #b0b0b0 !important; }
.slider-dots-manual .manual-dot.active { background: #10069f !important; }

/* desktop overlay animation */
@media (min-width: 826px) {
  .slider-dots-manual { margin-bottom: 10px !important; }

  .desktop-overlay {
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 50% !important;
    left: 5% !important;
    transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
    text-align: left !important;
    max-width: 500px !important;
    padding: 0 10px !important;
    z-index: 2 !important;
    animation: fadeSlideIn .8s ease-out both;
  }

  @keyframes fadeSlideIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-40%) translateX(-10%); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(0); }
  }
}

/* mobile dot spacing + force visibility pre-init */
@media (max-width: 825px) {
  .slider-container,
  .slider-dots-manual { margin-bottom: 10px !important; }

  .mobile-only { text-align: center !important; padding: 0 10px !important; }

  .mobile-only img {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: auto !important;
    margin: 0 auto !important;
  }

  .slider-container .slide,
  .slider-container .mobile-only { opacity: 1 !important; }
}

/* legacy helper kept for insurance (carousel rows elsewhere) */
.carousel-slider {
  max-width: 1280px !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   4. FEATURED IMAGE PROMO (Blocks 4 - 8 merged)
   ──────────────────────────────── */
.pagebuilder-row.featured-image-promo-row { /* full-bleed row */
  composes: full-bleed from global;
}
.featured-image-promo-row .promo-tile { box-sizing: border-box; }
.image-wrapper { position: relative; }
.image-wrapper img {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border: none;
  z-index: 1;
}
.overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 2;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  background: rgba(16, 6, 159, 0);
  transition: background .3s;
}
.overlay h2 { display: none; }
.promo-tile:hover .overlay { background: rgba(16, 6, 159, .5); }

@media (min-width: 1025px) {
  .promo-columns {
    display: flex !important;
    gap: 20px !important;
    justify-content: center;
    max-width: 1600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .promo-tile { width: calc(50% - 10px); }
  .mobile-header { display: none !important; }
}

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .promo-columns { padding: 0 15px; }

/* ────────────────────────────────
   5. TRIPLE & DOUBLE IMAGE ROWS
   ──────────────────────────────── */
.pagebuilder-row.triple-image-row {
  composes: full-bleed from global;
}
.triple-image-row .pagebuilder-column-group {
  max-width: 1600px !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  gap: 0 0 !important;
}
.triple-image-row .pagebuilder-column {
  flex: 1 1 33.333% !important;
  max-width: 33.333% !important;
  padding: 0 5px !important;
}
.triple-image-row .pagebuilder-column img {
  display: block;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
}
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .triple-image-row .pagebuilder-column {
    flex: 1 1 50% !important;
    max-width: 50% !important;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .triple-image-row { display: none !important; }
  .triple-image-row .pagebuilder-column {
    flex: 1 1 100% !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}

/* double-column variant */
.pagebuilder-row.double-image-row {
  composes: full-bleed from global;
}
.double-image-row .pagebuilder-column-group {
  max-width: 1600px !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
}
.double-image-row .pagebuilder-column {
  flex: 1 1 50% !important;
  max-width: 50% !important;
  padding: 0 10px !important;
}
.double-image-row .pagebuilder-column img {
  display: block;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
}
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .double-image-row .pagebuilder-column {
    flex: 1 1 100% !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   6. TWO-COLUMN MOBILE TILE GRID (Block 3)
   ──────────────────────────────── */
.mobile-two-column-tiles {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0 4px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.mobile-two-column-tiles .tile-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.mobile-two-column-tiles a { width: 50%; }
.mobile-two-column-tiles img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}
@media (min-width: 769px) {
  .mobile-two-column-tiles { display: none !important; }
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   7. MOBILE STANDARDIZATION
   ──────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  /* STANDARDIZE MOBILE-ONLY BLOCKS */
  .mobile-only,
  .pagebuilder-mobile-only,
  .mobile-two-column-tiles,
  .featured-image-promo-row--mobile {
    padding-left: 5px !important;
    padding-right: 5px !important;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  /* REMOVE redundant inner padding if present */
  .promo-columns--mobile,
  .mobile-two-column-tiles .tile-row {
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
  }
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   8. MOBILE LAYOUT / FULL-WIDTH AS DEFAULT
   ──────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  /* 1) Nuke horizontal padding/margins that constrain rows on mobile */
  .pagebuilder-row,
  .pagebuilder-column-group,
  .pagebuilder-column,
  .mobile-only,
  .pagebuilder-mobile-only,
  .promo-columns,
  .promo-columns--mobile {
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  /* Some PageBuilder rows add inner containers — normalize those too */
  .pagebuilder-row [class*="inner"],
  .pagebuilder-row [class*="container"] {
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
  }

  /* 2) Make media fill the screen width cleanly */
  .pagebuilder-row img,
  .pagebuilder-row video {
    display: block;
    width: 100% !important;   /* container is now full width, so 100% is edge-to-edge */
    height: auto !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }

  /* 3) Prevent accidental sideways scroll on small screens */
  html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; }
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   9. MOBILE GUTTER UTILITIES (opt-in)
   ──────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .gutter-5   { padding-left: 5px !important;  padding-right: 5px !important; }
  .gutter-10  { padding-left: 10px !important; padding-right: 10px !important; }
  .gutter-15  { padding-left: 15px !important; padding-right: 15px !important; }
  .gutter-20  { padding-left: 20px !important; padding-right: 20px !important; }
  .gutter-24  { padding-left: 24px !important; padding-right: 24px !important; }

  /* One-sided options if needed */
  .gutter-left-15  { padding-left: 15px !important; }
  .gutter-right-15 { padding-right: 15px !important; }
}

/* ────────────────────────────────
   10. MOBILE OVERLAY TWEAKS
   ──────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 825px) {
  .mobile-slide {
    position: relative;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .mobile-slide img {
    display: block;
    width: 100% !important;
    height: auto !important;
  }

  /* Text overlay at top of image */
  .mobile-text-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    top: 10px;                /* adjust spacing from top edge */
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 90%;
    text-align: center;
    color: #10069f;           /* your brand blue */
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .mobile-text-overlay .mobile-header {
    font-size: 2.2em;
    margin: 5px 0;
  }

  .mobile-text-overlay .mobile-secondary {
    font-size: 1.3em;
    margin: 2px 0;
  }

  /* Button stays below the image */
  .mobile-btn-wrapper { margin-top: 12px; }
}

                        el.remove();
                    });

                    const triggerDiv = widget.shadowRoot.querySelector('.acsb-trigger.acsb-widget[role="button"]');
                    if (triggerDiv) {
                        console.log('Removing role="button" from trigger inside shadow root:', triggerDiv);
                        triggerDiv.removeAttribute('role');
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                console.log('Could not access shadow DOM:', error);
            }
        });

        const lightTriggerDiv = document.querySelector('.acsb-trigger.acsb-widget[role="button"]');
        if (lightTriggerDiv) {
            console.log('Removing role="button" from light DOM:', lightTriggerDiv);
            lightTriggerDiv.removeAttribute('role');
        }

        // Insert legend into Klaviyo form fieldset only once
        const fieldsets = document.querySelectorAll('fieldset.needsclick');
        fieldsets.forEach(fieldset => {
            if (!fieldset.hasAttribute('data-legend-inserted')) {
                const legend = document.createElement('legend');
                legend.className = 'visuallyhidden';
                legend.textContent = "Consent Checkbox"; // Customize as needed
                fieldset.insertBefore(legend, fieldset.firstChild);
                fieldset.setAttribute('data-legend-inserted', 'true');
                console.log('Legend added to Klaviyo fieldset');
            }
        });
    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fixAllAccessibeIssues);
    [500, 1000, 2000, 3000].forEach(delay => setTimeout(fixAllAccessibeIssues, delay));

    const accessibeFixObserver = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
        for (const mutation of mutations) {
            if (mutation.type === 'childList' && mutation.addedNodes.length > 0) {
                setTimeout(fixAllAccessibeIssues, 100);
                break;
            }
        }
    });

    accessibeFixObserver.observe(document.body, {
        childList: true,
        subtree: true
    });

    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(fixAllAccessibeIssues, 500);
    });
})();
</script>
